CVE-2023-43091.title: A flaw was found in GNOME Maps, which is vulnerable to a code inj ...
CVE-2023-43091.description: A flaw was found in GNOME Maps, which is vulnerable to a code injection attack via its service.json configuration file. If the configuration file is malicious, it may execute arbitrary code.
